Description: "The Great Pyramids of Giza in Egypt, ancient wonders of the world."
"The Citadel of Qaitbay in Alexandria, Egypt, a historic fortress on the Mediterranean coast."
"The Kaaba in Mecca, Saudi Arabia, the holiest site in Islam."
"The Dome of the Rock in Jerusalem, a historic Islamic shrine with a golden dome."
"The blue-domed churches and white-washed buildings of Oia, Santorini, Greece, overlooking the sea."
A traditional Japanese Torii gate and temple structure illuminated at dusk, suggesting a quiet, spiritual place.
"The Eiffel Tower in Paris, France, an iconic landmark and symbol of French culture."
The Taj Mahal in Agra, India, iconic white marble mausoleum and symbol of love.
The Elizabeth Tower (Big Ben) in London, a famous historical clock tower.
"The Statue of Liberty in New York City, USA, a symbol of freedom and democracy."
